zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Luttrell於大約1188年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾時，她的父親Geoffrey Luttrell31歲，母親Frethesant de Paynell20歲。她和John Foljambe至少有6個兒子。她去世於1278年12月1日享年91歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭德比夏爾邱奇 維爾恩。

nameMeanings.name: Luttrell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): from a diminutive of Old French loutre ‘otter’ (from Latin lutra), applied as a nickname for someone thought to resemble an otter, or a metonymic occupational name for someone who hunted otters (for their pelts). Compare Luter and Litteral .

variants.name: Luter
meanings: from Old French loutre ‘otter’, either used as a nickname, or alternatively as a metonymic occupational name to denote an otter hunter.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Luttrell was born about 1188, in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Geoffrey Luttrell, was 31 and her mother, Frethesant de Paynell, was 20. She had at least 6 sons with John Foljambe. She died on 1 December 1278, at the age of 91, and was buried in Church Wilne, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

Elle a eu au moins 6 fils avec John Foljambe. Elle est décédée le 1 décembre 1278, à l’âge de 91 ans, et a été enterrée à Church Wilne, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Luttrellが約1188年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアで生まれた時，父Geoffrey Luttrellは31歳，母Frethesant de Paynellは20歳であった。彼女はJohn Foljambeとの間に少なくとも6人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1278年12月1日に91歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアチャーチ ウィルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Luttrell(이)가 대략 1188년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Geoffrey Luttrell(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Frethesant de Paynell(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 John Foljambe(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1278년 12월 1일 91세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 c후르치 윌네에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Luttrell родилась около 1188 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Geoffrey Luttrell было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Frethesant de Paynell, 20. У неё было по крайней мере 6 сыновей от John Foljambe. Она умерла 1 декабря 1278 г. в возрасте 91 год и была похоронена в местности чурч уилн, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания.
